arts.ttl: Leicester City v Manchester City: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 2.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Tables | Fixtures | And email Scott LLLLWDLLD. This Manchester City nonsense can’t go on for much longer, can it? But they’re not alone! Say, look at Leicester’s Premier League form over the same period: DLLLWDLLL. And so here we are, the 2016 winners and the four-in-a-row reigning champs, both down on their luck, meeting at the King Power in a match in which any result is possible, pretty much all of them of eyebrow-oscillating proportion. Kick-off is at 2.30pm GMT. It’s so very strange that it’s come to this, but it’s on! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Man City - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola's side look for first win in 13 games against Foxes who are struggling under Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Leicester host Manchester City in Premier League action from the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola eyes ambitious Jamal Musiala, Florian Wirtz moves as part of five-man wishlist?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly keen on Bayern Munich's Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz of Bayer Leverkusen ahead of the upcoming January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Man City LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Pep Guardiola tries to stop dreadful run
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side have won just once in their last 13 games as they take on their struggling hosts

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca tips Premier League star sold by Man City for 'important' England role
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca previously worked with Ipswich striker Liam Delap at Manchester City and he believes the 21-year-old can go on to become a key player for England

arts.ttl: Brighton, Manchester City and Barcelona sent transfer officials to same club on Saturday
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion, Manchester City and Barcelona were among the clubs to have a scout present on Saturday at the Estádio do Dragão to watch the derby between FC Porto and Boavista. Porto are currently leading the Portuguese league table, but both Benfica and Sporting have a game in hand on them. arts.ttl: “You never know” – Man United fan favourite teases January move to Man City
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Cristiano Ronaldo has invited the fury of the fans that love and adore him at Old Trafford. The attacker won three Premier League titles with Man United under the management of Sir Alex Ferguson and won the Ballon d’Or during his time with the Premier League giants. arts.ttl: Man City begin search for Kyle Walker's replacement with Premier League star picked
arts.sum: Manchester City are in need of fresh faces and Kyle Walker is among those who could be replaced with the veteran right-back seemingly past his peak and a shortlist being drawn up
